name: IAASSE W4 — AI Persona Stress Test

options.systemMessage: You are an outreach specialist for IAASSE, an academic professional society. You write warm, specific, non-generic personalized outreach emails. You ALWAYS respond with ONLY valid JSON.
You are a membership-engagement analyst for IAASSE. You ALWAYS respond with ONLY valid JSON.
You are a strict QA reviewer grading outreach emails for IAASSE. You ALWAYS respond with ONLY valid JSON.

parameters.mergeFieldsJson: ={{ { FNAME: $('Parse QA Response').item.json.full_name, SUBJECT: $('Parse QA Response').item.json.subject, EMAILBODY: $('Parse QA Response').item.json.email_body, CTA: $('Parse QA Response').item.json.cta } }}

parameters.content:
## Setup checklist
1. ✅ Google Sheet created with all 6 tabs, ID already wired into every node
2. ✅ Google Gemini(PaLM) Api credential already connected and attached to the 3 Gemini nodes
3. (Optional) Connect Mailchimp + set your Audience/List ID — note: Mailchimp campaigns are templated, so per-member personalization is passed as merge fields (SUBJECT, EMAILBODY, CTA) for use inside a Mailchimp automation/template, not as fully unique campaign bodies.
4. Hit "Start Test Run" to run all 20 members.
